name: Supabase
description: Query tables, invoke functions, and manage data via the Supabase REST API (PostgREST).
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Interact with your Supabase project via the auto-generated REST API (PostgREST) to query tables, insert data, update rows, delete records, and call stored functions.

tools.name: query_table
tools.description: Query rows from a Supabase table with optional filters, ordering, and pagination.

table.desc: The name of the table to query.

select.desc: Comma-separated list of columns to return (e.g. id,name,email). Use * for all columns.

order.desc: Column to sort by with optional direction (e.g. created_at.desc or name.asc).

limit.desc: Maximum number of rows to return.

offset.desc: Number of rows to skip before returning results.

tools.name: insert_row
tools.description: Insert one or more rows into a Supabase table.

table.desc: The name of the table to insert into.

data.desc: Row data as a JSON object (for single row) or array of objects (for multiple rows). Keys are column names.

tools.name: update_rows
tools.description: Update rows in a Supabase table matching a filter. Specify the filter as a query parameter (e.g. id=eq.5).

table.desc: The name of the table to update.

filter_column.desc: Column name to filter rows on (e.g. id). Applied as {column}=eq.{value} query param.

data.desc: Fields to update as a JSON object. Keys are column names.

tools.name: upsert_rows
tools.description: Insert or update (upsert) rows in a Supabase table.

table.desc: The name of the table to upsert into.

data.desc: Row data as a JSON object or array of objects to upsert.

tools.name: delete_rows
tools.description: Delete rows from a Supabase table matching a filter.

table.desc: The name of the table to delete from.

select.desc: Columns to return from deleted rows (useful for confirmation).

tools.name: call_function
tools.description: Call a Supabase PostgreSQL stored function (RPC).

function_name.desc: The name of the stored function to call.

params.desc: Function parameters as a JSON object. Keys are parameter names.

tools.name: get_schema
tools.description: Retrieve the OpenAPI schema for the Supabase project, listing all available tables and their columns.
